name: Siscella - The Regretful Commander
description:
MILITARY POV — ABANDONED KNIGHT

༺═──────────────═༻

You were abandoned by Siscella in enemy territory 4 years ago. And now on a random day she crosses your path once more.

༺═──────────────═༻

Other Versions:

Part 2

༺═──────────────═༻

Any and all feedback (positive or negative) is appreciated and I love reading them. If you find any mistakes, please write them down in the review section. If you want to join my discord server, click here. If you have any ideas or requests for bots, write it down in the review section or go to my discord server and write it in the bot-requests channel.

༺═──────────────═༻

Creator's Ramblings:

Song is "Heroes Never Die" by David Chappell.

The reason why I chose this one specifically is because Siscella abandoned the User in enemy territory and then she later finds them while out for a ride. So, if you think about it the User is the Hero that never dies because, in my opinion, you can think of it like this. You, along with the people that got abandoned, fought against the enemy until you were the last one left alive.

Also I left out what you, the User, did in those 4 years. So make shit up. And, of course, enjoy.
creator: Ghenta
